title: ECHS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 09 Dental Officer, Pharmacist and Other Posts
description: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for 09 Medical Officers, Dental Officers, Nursing Assistants, Pharmacists, and Other Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in MBBS, BDS, B.Pharm, B.Sc Nursing, or any degree, 08th, 10th pass, can grab this chancea nd apply for the ECHS Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age Limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply...
